Minimum quarterly operating profit margin observed over the past three years, short-term focus.
Minimum quarterly gross profit margin over the past three years (short horizon).
Short-term horizon component of Tobin’s Q (market value of assets relative to replacement cost; often proxied by market-to-book)
Short-horizon sum of dividends and stock repurchases/issuances per share, scaled by price.
Short-term ratio of cash flow from operations plus interest and tax paid to total interest and principal paid.
Total coverage ratio, measuring ability to cover interest and principal payments, over a short-term horizon.
Short-term ratio assessing a firm's ability to cover interest and principal payments from operating cash flow and related sources.
Short-term ratio of trading volume to shares outstanding, measuring liquidity.
Short-term trend in trading volume over the past 60 months, indicating liquidity changes.
Short-horizon difference between net income and operating cash flow over the trailing twelve months, scaled by beginning total assets.
Trailing twelve-month cash flow per share divided by price, over a short-term period.
Short-horizon trailing 12-month free cash flow-to-enterprise value ratio
Trailing 12-month free cash flow per share divided by price, measured over a short horizon.
Short-term horizon component of trailing 12-month free cash flow to price (FCF yield)
Trailing twelve-month sales per share divided by price, measured over a short-term period.
Projected growth in earnings per share for the next two years, measured over a short-term horizon.
Projected growth in earnings per share for the next two years, measured over a short-term horizon.
Minimum quarterly gross profit margin observed over the past two years, short-term focus.
Minimum quarterly operating profit margin observed over the past two years, short-term focus.
Projected two-year EPS growth, deflated by price, measured over a short horizon.
Short-horizon deviation of accounts payable from expected levels, scaled by total assets.
Short-horizon difference between actual and expected accounts receivable, scaled by total assets.
Short-horizon difference between actual and expected accrued liabilities, scaled by total assets.
Short-horizon difference between actual and expected depreciation, scaled by total assets.
Short-horizon difference between actual and expected inventory levels, scaled by total assets.
Sum of extraordinary, discontinued, and special items over two years as a percentage of sales, short-term view.
Short-horizon weighted average of industry relative FCF to price, core EPS to price, operating income to EV, reciprocal of dividend yield, and cash burn rate.
Short-term composite score evaluating valuation metrics such as price-to-earnings and price-to-book.
Valuation rank score over a short-term period, combining multiple valuation metrics.
Short-horizon equal-weighted composite rank of valuation and alert ranks.
Value to price rank score over a short-term period, assessing valuation attractiveness.
Short-term coefficient of variation of price volatility relative to trading volume over 20 days.
Weighted change in analyst ratings over a short-term period.
Short-horizon change in working capital accruals, reflecting changes in receivables, inventory, and payables.
Increase in receivables and inventory, decrease in payables and accrued liabilities, plus change in assets/liabilities, over a short-term window.
Short-horizon average working capital divided by average total assets.
Ratio of working capital to inventory, calculated over a short-term period.
Working capital as a percentage of trailing twelve-month sales, short-term average.
Short-horizon year-over-year change in accruals as a percentage of average total assets.
Year-over-year change in the current ratio, measured over a short-term period.
Short-horizon rank of the change in total debt over the last 12 months.
Year-over-year change in gross profit margin
Most recent quarterly gross profit margin minus margin for same quarter one year ago, measured over a short horizon.
Year-over-year change in leverage ratio over a short-term horizon.
Year-over-year change in accounts receivable to current assets ratio, short-term calculation.
Year-over-year change in return on assets, measured over a short-term period.
Short-horizon rank of the change in common shares outstanding over the last 12 months.
Year-over-year change in net operating assets as a proportion of total assets, calculated for a medium-term period.
